25.question_en: The data suggests a trend. _____, more research is needed.

26.question_en: Online learning offers flexibility. _____, it can be affordable.

26.explanation_zh: For instance 举例说明局限。
26.question_en: The study had limitations. _____, the sample was small.
The experiment showed positive results. _____, we cannot generalize.

options: In conclusion, switching to renewables benefits both.
26.answer: In conclusion, switching to renewables benefits both.

26.question_en: Reading improves vocabulary. _____, it expands knowledge.

26.instruction_zh: Where does "This supports the main argument" fit

options: The weather was bad, so we stayed home.
The weather was bad. We stayed.
27.answer: The weather was bad, so we stayed home.

options: After finishing the report, she sent it to her boss.
She finished the report. Then she sent it.
27.answer: After finishing the report, she sent it to her boss.

27.explanation_zh: While 连接对比，用词更丰富。
options: While many see technology as beneficial, others have concerns.
Many think technology is good. But some think it is bad.
27.answer: While many see technology as beneficial, others have concerns.

options: He studied hard, so he passed the exam.
27.answer: He studied hard, so he passed the exam.

options: Cities are crowded, which can lead to stress and pollution.
27.answer: Cities are crowded, which can lead to stress and pollution.

27.explanation_zh: so...that 自然表达程度与结果。
options: The book was so interesting that I read it in one day.
The book is interesting. I read it in one day.
27.answer: The book was so interesting that I read it in one day.

options: Cost and time are among the main considerations.
There are many reasons. One is cost. Another is time.
27.answer: Cost and time are among the main considerations.

options: The meeting was cancelled, so we had more time to prepare.
The meeting was cancelled. We had more time.
27.answer: The meeting was cancelled, so we had more time to prepare.

options: Online learning is popular because it offers flexibility.
27.answer: Online learning is popular because it offers flexibility.

options: Reading is a valuable habit that contributes to learning.
I like reading. It helps me learn.
27.answer: Reading is a valuable habit that contributes to learning.
